nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Dusky crested flycatcher
nodes.summary: Dusky crested flycatcher（Elminia nigromitrata）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Dusky crested flycatcher。

nodes.name: Dusky crested flycatcher
nodes.summary: The dusky crested flycatcher (Elminia nigromitrata) is a species of bird in the family Stenostiridae. It is widespread across the African tropical rainforest. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests and subtropical or tropical moist montane forests. References

nodes.name: Elminia
